note: Daebak content taxonomy (Q&A Expansion Map). MANUALLY EDITABLE, PERMANENT. Slugs here are permanent (no year) and define hub URLs /<category> and /<category>/<cluster>. The Python pipeline (taxonomy.py) and the Next.js site both read this file. Counts (published/draft/needsUpdate) are computed live, never stored here.
